channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin rallies on report of Iran ceasefire talks, Algorand extends gains
item.description: If a ceasefire materializes, a relief rally could further benefit risk assets. For now, traders appear to be treating the headlines with skepticism.

item.title: China's tax authority urges banks to implement blockchain for lending services
item.description: China’s leading tax and financial authorities are urging banks to incorporate blockchain technology to bolster their credit facilities and data transparency.

item.title: North Korean Hackers Spent Six Months Infiltrating Drift Before $285M Exploit
item.description: Drift Protocol said the attackers posed as traders, met contributors in person, and spent months infiltrating before draining the platform.

item.title: First real bull signal since 2025? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin hinted at a long-term bullish trend change as BTC neared an MACD cross that last resulted in $25,000 gains over two months.

item.title: Iran war bets turn prediction markets into real-time macro radar: Sygnum
item.description: As Iran war odds swing on Polymarket and Kalshi, Sygnum’s Fabian Dori says prediction markets are fast becoming macro tools for crypto desks.

item.title: IMF warns tokenization could bring crypto risks into global financial markets
item.description: Tokenization could amplify volatility through automated markets and smart contracts, the report said.

item.title: Bitcoin Hits Weekly High Over $69K on US-Iran Ceasefire Hopes as Oil Slides
item.description: Bitcoin jumped on reports that Pakistan has put together a framework for a U.S.-Iran ceasefire, but analysts remain cautious.

item.title: Inflation takes center stage: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 6.

item.title: China orders Apple to pull Dorsey's Bitchat, the messaging app used during Iran protests
item.description: The peer-to-peer app runs entirely over Bluetooth and mesh networks without an internet connection, making it popular with protesters and incompatible with Beijing's censorship regime.

item.title: Circle future-proofs Arc blockchain against quantum computing threats
item.description: Circle’s Arc blockchain said users will be able to create wallets that withstand future quantum computer attacks from day one.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin's profit-to-loss transaction ratio has hit 2.95, its highest in 12 weeks and a historically reliable short-term price top signal, per Santiment. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5iZWNaSlJoejVRM3g0VHgzQkdPQWdmSzBmcWhqRWdlNlUwdjI5Q3RBUlROYWlTem9YWEp0VmdWV2NpRHpIU0tNQV92WWMtd1dYRGVUQ1NyQzNuX3R2a2FDX29NeGY?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin's profit-to-…

item.title: Anthropic says one of its Claude models was pressured to lie, cheat and blackmail
item.description: In one of the experiments, the chatbot resorted to blackmail after it found an email about replacing it, while in another, it cheated to complete a task with a tight deadline.

item.title: Circle unveils quantum-resistant roadmap for its layer-1 blockchain Arc
item.description: Circle’s plan to make Arc quantum-resistant comes amid increasing fears that "Q-Day" may come sooner than anticipated.

item.title: North Korean workers have been infiltrating DeFi for 7 years: Researcher
item.description: Security researcher Taylor Monahan listed at least 40 decentralized finance platforms she claims have been infiltrated by North Korean IT workers at some stage of their lives.

item.title: XRP drifts higher to $1.33, but range-bound trade still dominates
item.description: Rising volume and steady support near $1.30 suggest buyers are active, though XRP remains tied to broader crypto sentiment.

item.title: Bitcoin reclaims $69,000 as ceasefire talks surface and crypto shorts get squeezed
item.description: A report that the U.S. and Iran are discussing a 45-day ceasefire lifted risk assets across the board on Monday, with short liquidations outpacing longs nearly 3-to-1 in the past 12 hours.

item.title: 🔥 BIG: A solo Bitcoin miner beat 1-in-28,000 odds to win a $210,000 block reward, collecting 3.139 $BTC despite running a relatively small mining setup. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBfczFlbUxZWjFaUWRmMl9tb3JiWkFWNVVKbjUzN2l6YTlhckhwdzNEQm9fZERUQnJzcWQ2LXB6SEZGdUNHSHY5N2FkYTJ0eEhXUWpsRUFyQXoyTWtCS2o2MW1VNnE?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: A solo Bitcoin miner be…

item.title: Apple pulls Jack Dorsey's Bitchat from China at Beijing’s request
item.description: Bitchat launched in July last year and has been used during protests in Madagascar, Uganda, Nepal, Indonesia and Iran as authorities attempted to restrict usage of the internet.

item.title: Bitcoin meltdown to $10,000 remains likely unless prices reclaim $75,000, analyst says
item.description: Bloomberg's Mike McGlone has reiterated his forecast that Bitcoin could plunge to $10,000, this time anchoring his outlook to a clear line in the sand: $75,000.

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Crypto trader James Wynn has been liquidated shorting Bitcoin on Hyperliquid, wiping his account from $100M down to just $900, per Arkham. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE43S2VENFdsSjdwQkdmZUtMdHdSblhxUVdKcWFyVWxVZ1hwUWJJVnBJSWkwckpXVkxQYk9pRzJReEZ1OGtnU0ZQZXZ0MXF6akdKY1VEOEVINWVXSTY0Z2c4QjYtMTE?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NOW: Crypto trader James Wyn…

item.title: Michael Saylor hints at next Strategy Bitcoin buy after weeklong pause
item.description: Michael Saylor posted "back to work" on X on Sunday, signaling a potential Bitcoin purchase after the firm paused buying last week.

item.title: Trump-Iran deadline chaos sends crypto higher while ceasefire hopes rise
item.description: US President Donald Trump threatened Iran could be "living in Hell" if it doesn't open the Strait of Hormuz, though he also told reporters that a deal with Iran is getting close.

item.title: Circle announced the quantum-resistant roadmap for its L1 blockchain Arc, adopting a phased approach to full-stack quantum resistance across wallets, private state, validators, and infrastructure. The mainnet will introduce post-quantum signatures with an opt - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1HeHljQXR6WWRCc3hNaE5iTVFIaGN0MGNiRXA0NGt3dDF4SHc5MXplR1V6UExrZHFsRFE2VUtDaW5DbG1JV256TXlTODBfc3BEano4b3lkWnljMDhiVm5TdnA4cw?oc=5" target="_blank">Circle announced the quantum-res…

item.title: Rwanda swats Bybit’s P2P platform offering franc-to-crypto trading
item.description: The Rwanda central bank's warning came after Bybit added the Rwanda franc to its list of assets that its peer-to-peer platform can use to trade for crypto.

item.title: JAMES WYNN: HYPERLIQUIDATED James Wynn has just been liquidated shorting Bitcoin. He once had $100M - his account is now down to its last $900. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9ZVkNmampmS1oyMnlVell3TThCNEFBUzZLVFpnWWRZbmtCbDZhZWJTSF80cDNLVnVNVm9KYVpwcjFKWF81eUE4QUpfdmZwOUNhM0Q1VER6R3dDMzg?oc=5" target="_blank">JAMES WYNN: HYPERLIQUIDATED James Wynn has …

item.title: JUST IN: $69,000 Bitcoin $100,000,000 worth of crypto shorts liquidated in the past 90 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBya2hIaUcyT0lkZEJqaW82M2RZV2owa0R2WTNlQjhlVFVzNFY3bHN0c09QTFRjYnFlNDl5V2tjWGlYajN1VzdGZjRLb3RCaEFPMXA1UnpuVmZOeDZKU0t1TGRn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $69,000 Bitcoin $100,000,…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto attorney says Drift incident may qualify as 'civil negligence'
item.description: The $280 million Drift Protocol attack was likely carried out by threat actors aligned with North Korea state-affiliated hackers.

item.title: A simple explainer on what quantum computing actually is, and why it is terrifying for bitcoin
item.description: Most simplifies the complex process of quantum computing as "it can be 0 and 1 at the same time." That is not an explanation for why it threatens Bitcoin. This is.

item.title: JUST IN: Peter Schiff calls Bitcoin a "shitcoin" and challenges Michael Saylor to a debate. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5UcnJkN2tlc3dFcHhfVmF2NnhGaXJkVmNLUTRiZGlEZDYxR25aei1HRmdHSEpBVVVWOUJLRUJ4eWZzRG00SGlLZlQyM1ZZRVpTZWdfa3dhZmh2T3p3M0FXbHdn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Peter Schiff calls Bitcoi…

item.title: Polymarket odds of US invading Iran this year reach 63% after Trump's post
item.description: The President of the United States continues to give contradictory signals of escalating the war and winding it down within a few weeks.

item.title: Polymarket pulls controversial Iran rescue markets after intense backlash
item.description: Prediction markets face rising regulatory pressure, with congressional Democrats proposing legislation to ban contracts tied to elections, war and government actions.

item.title: Bitcoin and the US dollar have a 'symbiotic' relationship: BPI exec
item.description: Demand for either currency strengthens both in a reinforcing relationship, contrary to popular sentiment, Sam Lyman told Cointelegraph.

item.title: Potential $10,000 Bitcoin in 2026 Prove me wrong - stay above $75,000. Before the biggest money pump in history in 2020-21, Bitcoin hovered around $10,000, and it may be reverting. Roughly $10,000 is also the first-born crypto's most traded price since 201 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5DNUd3NXpWV0thYWFodTlrNWVTX0dpNGMycXI5ZjhtQXpZQ1lYbk84bHZGSklobktpQS1xMkgyU3ZMMGozWGNOenNBbEYtMnBxdnZMV0FMRFR5dlhMeXZfY2VYMEw?oc=5" target="_blank">Potential $10,000 Bitcoin in 20…

item.title: Bitcoin is now front-running the Fed rather than reacting to it. ETFs are the cause
item.description: Bitcoin's correlation with global central bank easing has turned strongly negative since 2024, suggesting BTC now leads rather than lags monetary policy signals.

item.title: AI is making crypto's security problem even worse, Ledger CTO warns
item.description: Ledger’s Charles Guillemet says artificial intelligence is making hacks cheaper and faster, forcing a rethink of how crypto systems stay secure.

item.title: Timeframes matter. Since Aug 2020, Bitcoin is the top-performing major asset and it’s not even close. Zoom out further and the gap only widens. $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9KeTlfOVNRQ3pxVmlJa3JvUlBTcEhNWDY1UW1DeENYVGp1UDlHNGx1OHlHNFZqZWhrS0tsVWgtVk5OZ2hlZXFQSHR5VkZmQ21FcXkxUXpsbk9TdUk?oc=5" target="_blank">Timeframes matter. Since Aug 2020, Bitcoin …

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "₿ack to Work." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5PeTFhQ3V1cnl6aGpXeHE4dklheURaSGdvQlpwajlNME5MMHd5OVh2RVN4Yjg5blZQS1h5NXVRcVBQWDR6ZnlURTFXVDZTcGtPM1pJMkFhaGV5TGczSWhZT0RB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Drift says $270 million exploit was a six-month North Korean intelligence operation
item.description: Attackers posed as a trading firm, met Drift contributors in person across multiple countries, deposited $1 million of their own capital, and waited half a year before executing the drain CoinDesk detailed earlier this week.

item.title: Robert Kiyosaki recommends Bitcoin, gold as 1974 shift comes full circle
item.description: The "Rich Dad Poor Dad" author continues to back Bitcoin, gold and silver as alternatives to traditional money.

item.title: The volatility is extremely low on the markets for #Bitcoin. It has hit the lowest point (on the 4-hour) since the entire breakdown. If you put this in context, then we're at the end of the vol squeeze currently. It doesn't usually last any longer than this when markets a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5CTkhZM0J0ekdJRDU2VjUwS1dCazdLT2o2ZnpBc2tlb3R2M3M3aE9mVXdYbXJ2aTBNVjYzbDFYOEV0U0ZGWUdOOGNIeHBOSlhMNmFCd1FHU2ZSX1UzZTZEM2xIZw?oc=5" target="_blank">The volatility is extremely low …

item.title: Ant Group’s blockchain arm unveils platform for AI agents to transact on crypto rails
item.description: Anvita includes tokenization services and a platform for agents to coordinate tasks and settle payments in real time using stablecoins.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady as sentiment hits worst levels since Iran war began
item.description: Social sentiment, on-chain data, and positioning metrics all hit extremes not seen since late February, even as institutional buying remains elevated.

item.title: New Bitcoin price lows 'matter of time' says trader with BTC stuck at $67K
item.description: Bitcoin added downside BTC price warnings as Binance order-book data showed multiple investor classes selling coins into the weekend.

item.title: This message was embedded in #Bitcoin's 666,666th block. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1Dd2d1eTBnT1RfZDdfbEpGbk9xTzRJQXpSQmNMNEFneEhoejBUdmFlSFJRZVBxaE5Qc1p6NFA3MXVhbjdnNnFFZlVSZ1otRy0taGVFdS01ZFc2czRBQ181MlZSZ2dWM2c?oc=5" target="_blank">This message was embedded i…

item.title: ‘Existential’ token problem seen as supply outpaces value creation: Blockworks exec
item.description: Blockworks' Michael Ippolito sees surge in token supply diluting returns, breaking the link between fundamentals and price while raising concerns about crypto’s long-term model.

item.title: Traders Hunt Next Memecoin Amid Sideways Crypto Prices - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5zSzB1V1VvVXdTdnUzczI0WHZWdFcwRjlJc0ZaOWFkSmVfaW1QN3VzVXBXWXhkVk5TSGJ4Q3ZMNG5YNV8xTVRXOTJvN0hpempQbC00QkJtTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Traders Hunt Next Memecoin Amid Sideways Crypto …

item.title: Anthropic launches PAC amid tensions with Trump administration over AI policy
item.description: AI firm Anthropic forms an employee-funded PAC while facing questions over political balance and a growing dispute with the Pentagon over AI use.

item.title: Drift Protocol says $280M exploit took 'months of deliberate preparation'
item.description: Drift Protocol said with “medium-high confidence” that the recent attack was carried out by the same actors responsible for the $58 million Radiant Capital hack in October 2024.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UPDATE: The UK Government's Bitcoin wallet has now lost around $3.5B since October 6, 2025. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1iWUpuZThraFlFS2ZFRFBiZmF2R2NYSG1JNEZRU3plVWtBZXlqYVNqdVdyYTJlUlMxclVReUN3b25xZVlHRExUUU1VdU4zYko2NklJd1I1RG5VODNWRVMxY2RyNUs?oc=5" target="_blank">🇬🇧 UPDATE: The UK Government'…

item.title: Bitcoin bearish social chatter reaches 5-week high: Santiment
item.description: Santiment said bearish Bitcoin comments on social media have climbed to a five-week high, which could signal a reversal sooner rather than later.

item.title: Bitcoin's $1.3 trillion security race: Key initiatives aimed at quantum-proofing the world's largest blockchain
item.description: Developers are considering ways to quantum-proof the world's oldest cryptocurrency as the threat of this computing moves beyond a hypothetical.

item.title: JUST IN: Probe into the $285 million Drift Protocol crypto hack found team members were approached at conferences by representatives tied to a North Korean-linked operation. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBBWERIaGxoSDBrU3JOakZIXzZDbS1UYjEtYkFBamZ3ZVFHSjVtZWFQeWJCS2kzWWUxbVFoMUZmNFN5ZVJ5a1NVeG5DWEFKTV9RMDNZMVFTQWxBNjllT0k3Uw?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Probe into the $285 million…

item.title: Bitcoin tends to outperform gold and stocks after global shocks, Mercado Bitcoin finds
item.description: The study analyzed 60-day windows after economic or geopolitical shocks and found that Bitcoin posted stronger returns than gold and the S&P 500 in each period.

item.title: Ex-UK Chancellor backs bitcoin as alternative to failing systems
item.description: Kwasi Kwarteng reflects on current UK market turmoil, fiscal “doom loop,” and his move into bitcoin with Stack BTC.

item.title: Digital asset treasuries must now earn their keep
item.description: For treasuries to do so and stay competitive, Kiernan unpacks three broad strategies that are emerging.

item.title: AI Giant Anthropic Files to Launch 'AnthroPAC' Amid Clash With Trump Administration
item.description: Claude developer Anthropic registered an employee-funded PAC amid a legal battle with the White House and rising election-year scrutiny of AI.

item.title: Bitcoin has won. Global consensus is that $BTC is digital capital. The four-year cycle is dead. Price is now driven by capital flows. Bank and digital credit will determine Bitcoin’s growth trajectory. The biggest risk is bad ideas driving iatrogenic protocol changes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE4wSEV4eWhmYmRGVFZieTI5Vm1FYUs3VVptaXdTa09DbmJ5bW9kVXhLaGJGRTFoamlaVjZWT0ZVRkN2ZjZhVkdHRTBJYTJtS2xiS1NaYmRXTldIMjg?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin has won. Global consensus is that $…

item.title: Traders are the big winners as 24/7 stocks will finally end the after-hours price 'manipulation'
item.description: Round-the-clock markets promise freedom for investors and pressure for intermediaries who traditionally wielded immense power during off-hours

item.title: Anthropic Spots 'Emotion Vectors' Inside Claude That Influence AI Behavior
item.description: Researchers say internal emotion-like signals shape how large language models make decisions.
